title: T-010 — Cascade Chain 1: Pack_Size → Line → Equipment_Setup (NPD-a.2)
prompt:
# T-010 — Cascade Chain 1

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §6.1 Chain 1, §6.3 perf
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement cascade engine handler that on fa.pack_size change clears fa.line + fa.equipment_setup, and on fa.line change auto-fills fa.equipment_setup from Reference.Equipment_Setup_By_Line_Pack.

## Implementation contract
New packages/cascade-engine/src/chain1-pack-size.ts exporting handlePackSizeChange(productCode, newPackSize) and handleLineChange(productCode, newLine). Both run in tx: read product row, mutate via updateFaCell-equivalent (skipping reset_built propagation since values cleared not edited by user), emit fa.cascade events. Lookup uses Reference.Equipment_Setup_By_Line_Pack composite PK.

## Files
- packages/cascade-engine/src/chain1-pack-size.ts [create]
- packages/cascade-engine/__tests__/chain1.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given fa with pack_size='250g' line='L1' equipment_setup='ES1', when handlePackSizeChange(productCode,'500g') runs, then line and equipment_setup are NULL
2. Given fa with pack_size='500g' and Reference row (line='L7', pack_size='500g', equipment_setup='ES7'), when handleLineChange(productCode,'L7') runs, then equipment_setup='ES7'
3. Given full chain1 cascade for one FA, when measured, then end-to-end completes <200 ms p95 over 1000 trial runs (perf gate per §6.3)

## Test strategy
- RED: tests for clear-on-pack-change + auto-fill + perf benchmark
- Run 'pnpm --filter cascade-engine test chain1'

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-fill when pack_size or line is empty
- Do not bypass tenant RLS
- Do not regress chain perf gate

pipeline_inputs.description: Pack_Size cascade clears Line + Equipment_Setup; Line cascade auto-fills Equipment_Setup from Reference lookup.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two pure handlers with DB tx, reading lookup table and writing cleared/auto-filled values. Perf budget <200 ms p95.
out_of_scope: Do not write Reference data here
